title: Changing the currency in sales dashboard
excerpt: The currency in my Deal tracker is set to GBP but in the Sales Dashboard figures are displayed in USD.  How to I change the dashboard to GBP?

posts.author: julie.swanzy (Julie Swanzy)
posts.cookedHtml: The currency in my Deal tracker is set to GBP but in the Sales Dashboard figures are displayed in USD. How to I change the dashboard to GBP?

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there! Is this being displayed in the Dashboard through a Numbers Widget ?

If so, you can adjust the Unit in the settings of the widget:

Screenshot 2024-07-18 at 2.19.37 PM1441×714 62.7 KB

posts.author: julie.swanzy (Julie Swanzy)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Malia, thanks for replying. I don’t have a widget settings option. We’re currently using the free CRM in Monday, but looking to upgrade shortly. I’m thinking that because we are on the free plan, we are limited on what we can adjust/see?

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for following up, Julie! Would you be able to send me a screenshot of what you’re seeing? I’d love to take a look so that I can best help!

posts.author: julie.swanzy (Julie Swanzy)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Malia, screenshot below as requested. I don’t seem to have the cog wheel to go into settings/widgets?

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you for sending this, Julie!

Taking a look, I can see you’re viewing the Dashboard from the “View” tab, which will not have the widget settings. That said, I noticed the “Edit” tab is grayed out.

To confirm, if you hover your cursor/mouse over the grayed out “Edit” text, does a pop-up appear noting why this is not an option? I’ve included a screenshot too show what I’m looking for:

Screenshot 2024-07-29 at 3.39.54 PM1231×546 63.6 KB

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml: @julie.swanzy converting currency on monday.com CRM is possible with Smart Column app and super easy to set up. See below
